privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new gym member in the local wger fitness manager. The expected user account details to be submitted are: Username 'john_trainee', First name 'John', Last name 'Smith', Email 'john.smith@fitnessgym.com', and Role 'User'. Any existing account with username 'john_trainee' is actively purged from the Django database during the task setup script.
